title: The Tontatta Believe in Usoland
description: Pages 1–4 focus on the tontatta believe in usoland, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
scene: This part follows Marines, Robin, Tontatta, Violet, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #10, Unknown person #11 as the dwarves of Green Bit draw Usopp and Robin into their rebellion, believing Usopp is the legendary hero who will save them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: A book, a notebook, a change of clothes, a Dender Mu- shi...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Some- thing weird under her clothing

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Be sure to confiscate any and all weapons!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: seems to be nothing hidden here either...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Where in the world am I...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Are you a bad big- human!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: This big- human can use magic !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: At that moment, from be- neath my feet...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Hands suddenly sprung up like flo- were

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Are you the one who stripped the Marines of their things ....!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: They knocked me out somehow and brought me here...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I wonder if usopp is all right...

dialogue.speaker: Violet
dialogue.text: I seem to be able to use my ability... but that would probably make matters worse...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Am I... Under the ground of green bit?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Yes. Beneath the great forest that our Tribe has cultivated.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: There's no plant we cannot raise !!!

dialogue.speaker: Tontatta
dialogue.text: This is our land, the Tontatta Kingdom!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I've sewed you to the ground with my "Nui NUI" power!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: We cannot allow anyone who has seen us...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'm sorry. I only reached out because I was curious.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Never intended any harm... and I'll never speak a word about having seen you...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: You lie!! You think that sort of excuse is gonna work!!

summary: Pages 1–4 focus on the tontatta believe in usoland, keeping the Dressrosa conflict centered on the characters active in this scene.
